header.heroClaim: I build websites, manage product data pipelines, and design custom systems that solve real business problems. I work with React, Drupal, WordPress, and AI automation.

projectVivenutricion.description: Redesigned the Vivenutrición website to modernize its look and feel, improve UI/UX, and create a more professional brand presence. Worked on defining typography, color palette, and visual hierarchy while applying custom CSS to enhance layout, responsiveness, and overall user interaction.

projectGeek.description: Custom WordPress site for a content creator. Full control of the content, YouTube integration, and a layout focused on growing the audience.

projectDimplex.description: Web Manager for dimplex.com, the main brand site for Glen Dimplex Americas. A Drupal product catalog and brand site for US, EN-CA, and FR-CA markets. I own product visibility on the web, technical SEO, and the integrations with Plytix (PIM) and CommerceTools. Right now I'm also leading the Google Ads launch for the brand from scratch: baseline capture, SEO cleanup, and campaign architecture.

projectConvectair.description: Web Manager for convectair.ca, the bilingual EN/FR-CA brand site of Convectair. A Drupal catalog that shares infrastructure across the Glen Dimplex Americas ecosystem.

projectCadet.description: Web Manager for cadetheat.com, Cadet's brand site for the US market. A Drupal catalog inside the multi-brand Glen Dimplex Americas ecosystem.

projectAmazonMap.description: A custom MAP (Minimum Advertised Price) violation monitoring system I built from scratch for Dimplex. Three apps running on Fly.io, automated with GitHub Actions, connected to Rainforest API. Live in production, used every day by the CS team to enforce pricing with third-party sellers on Amazon.

projectSebra.description: A personal AI knowledge management system. A second brain with detailed documentation and a graphical neural-network interface that shows topics, relationships, and open questions at a glance. Mixes deliberate process documentation with experimental AI workflows to make better decisions at work.

projectEmber.description: Designing and building Ember, a Botpress chatbot for customer support in EN-CA and FR-CA on dimplex.com. Currently in architecture phase. Knowledge base built from 123 internal CS docs. 5 priority use cases defined with the CS team.

projectInfanti.description: Worked as Front-End Developer for Infanti for over 1 year, building custom components like timers and layout tweaks using both code and the CMS page builder. Blended different techniques to improve design, usability, and performance.

projectVocal.description: Built a WordPress site for a vocal director to showcase her expertise and passion for music. Focused on a modern, dynamic design with intuitive navigation to engage clients and collaborators.

projectMarket.description: 3-month internship as Front-End Developer, focused on diagnosing and improving site performance. Worked alongside a digital agency to fix layout issues, optimize images and scripts, and enhance SEO structure.

projectChatbot.description: Developed an AI-powered chatbot for my Portfolio v2 to improve user interaction and provide real-time navigation support. Built with logic-based algorithms and AI training for seamless, conversational access to information.

projectPortfolioV2.description: New Portfolio designed and developed to showcase the tools and technologies I've mastered over the past year, including React, and Tailwind CSS, in a modern, mobile-first design.

projectGlobal.description: Website Optimization, fix existing errors, improve overall functionality, and translate the content into Spanish. Project approached by enhancing site performance.

projectCanjet.description: Responsible for creating a Pattern Library and a  dashboard that visualizes data through interactive charts. To achieve this, I used D3.js.

projectInfantiTerms.description: Optimize the accessibility of legal information and print document for users.

projectPortfoliov1.description: Showcase my skills and experiences effectively.

projectOccupancy.description: Designed to display real-time business occupancy levels, featuring a clean and responsive UI styled with Tailwind CSS. This component is ready to integrate with APIs that provide crowd data.

projectQuickbooker.description: Event Management System for Small Businesses is a web-based platform designed to help small businesses like restaurants, parks, or event halls manage and offer event bookings. Customers can browse available venues, check details, and reserve spaces.

projectResourcesPage.description: Developing MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and integrations to extend AI capabilities with custom tools and data sources

projectChetracker.description: Mobile app that digitizes check management through photo capture and OCR technology for secure, organized tracking.

toolBox.title: My Toolkit
toolBox.description: My commitment to learning is unwavering; in this dynamic field, continuous education is imperative for staying relevant.

about.p1: I'm a Web Manager and Web Developer with 5+ years of experience building, managing, and optimizing websites, CMS-based platforms, and custom internal tools.
about.p2: I work with React, Tailwind, JavaScript, and Drupal. I also have deep experience with WordPress, performance optimization, SEO, accessibility, and AI automation.
about.p3: Right now I'm the Web Manager at Glen Dimplex Americas. I run digital operations for three brand sites (Dimplex, Convectair, Cadet) and lead custom projects like a Botpress chatbot, a Google Ads launch, and a custom Amazon MAP monitoring system that runs in production every day.
about.p4: Based in Cambridge, Ontario, Canada. I like building things where code, strategy, and content meet.
